use_cases: Rotating service offerings or categories in a hero section with smooth character-by-character animation
Displaying dynamic taglines or keywords on landing pages
Showing cycling text content in portfolio or agency websites
Animated word transitions for product descriptions in e-commerce
Loading state or transitional text display for web applications
ai_summary: A text animation component that cycles through an array of words with GSAP-powered character-by-character fade and slide effects. Words appear with staggered opacity and y-axis movement, creating a smooth blur-in/blur-out rotation effect. Built with Tailwind CSS for easy customization and optimized for hero sections, landing pages, and any context requiring dynamic rotating text content.
